HomeBaner

I-SPORT Medical Centre

Orthopedic Doctor Serving Baner, Pune

Residents of Baner, Pune have convenient access to expert sports orthopedic care at I-SPORT Medical Centre, located just minutes away in Balewadi. Dr. Sumedh Magar specialises in ACL reconstruction, knee arthroscopy, shoulder surgery, and sports medicine.

Book Appointment

Getting Here from Baner

I-SPORT Medical Centre is located in Balewadi, approximately 2–5 minutes from Baner. Accessible via Baner-Balewadi Road.

Services Available

ACL ReconstructionKnee ArthroscopyShoulder ArthroscopyMeniscus RepairSports RehabilitationPRP Therapy

Also Serving Nearby Areas

BalewadiPashanAundhSusMahalunge

About Dr. Sumedh Magar

Dr. Sumedh Magar is a fellowship-trained sports orthopedic surgeon with an MS in Orthopaedics and a Masters in Sports Medicine from University College London (UCL). He is the Founder and Director of I-SPORT Medical Centre and serves as Lead Sports Medicine Doctor for Khelo India.

Read Full Profile
